summary: First iteration of full-stack testing for VicRoads Probationary Licence wallet (Expo Web + FastAPI). 7/7 backend pytest tests passed and full E2E UI flow (admin login -> create account -> sign in -> view licence card -> lock/unlock -> delete) succeeded.

issues: RN-web console warnings: deprecated 'shadow*' style props (use boxShadow) and props.pointerEvents (use style.pointerEvents). Non-blocking but should eventually be migrated.

action_items: (Optional) Migrate deprecated react-native-web style props (shadow*, pointerEvents) to remove console warnings.
(Optional) Consider hardening the duplicate-codes check so updating an account to clashing (digits, letters) is also rejected; currently PUT does not enforce uniqueness.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses on_event('startup'/'shutdown') which are deprecated in FastAPI; switch to lifespan handlers in a future cleanup.
PUT /api/accounts/{id} excludes None values via 'if v is not None'; this means callers cannot intentionally clear a field by sending null. Acceptable for current UI but worth noting.
Admin credentials are hardcoded in /app/frontend/app/index.tsx (ADMIN_DIGITS/ADMIN_LETTERS). Fine for a demo wallet but should not ship to production.
Duplicate (digits, letters) uniqueness is only enforced on POST, not on PUT — a malicious/admin update could produce a clash and break login lookup.
Backend has no unique index on (digits, letters) in MongoDB — race-prone; consider creating a compound unique index.
index.tsx is ~2260 lines; consider splitting LoginScreen/AdminScreen/LicenceScreen/styles into separate files per code-review guideline (>700 lines).
test_credentials: Admin digits=4095 letters=QUAYDE. Test user created during E2E: name=TEST_E2E_User digits=123456 letters=XYZ (deleted at end of test).
seed_data_creation: No seed data left behind — test accounts are cleaned up via pytest fixture teardown and explicit delete in the Playwright flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is on FastAPI at <PREVIEW_URL>/api, MongoDB DB=vicroads_licence collection=accounts. Frontend is Expo web (port 3000 internally) served on the same preview domain. Use Admin credentials 4095/QUAYDE. All UI testIDs are present and reliable: admin-button, login-digits/letters/submit, admin-digits/letters/submit, admin-create-open, create-name/digits/letters, randomize-btn, create-save, lock-{id}, delete-{id}, delete-confirm, reveal-qr, save-edit, logout-button, admin-exit, barcode. The app is mobile-first; test at viewport 390x844 for best layout.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration.
